texto: ... the effort to discover an authentic self, to strip away layers of alienation and culturally imposed identity and find a soul in a clear, unimpeded communion with the sacred is consonant with spiritual quests throughout the ages. Spiritual feminists, no less than medieval mystics, are searching in the ways made available to them through their culture to separate themselves from everything in their hearts and minds that puts them at odds with the divine plan (and therefore with their own best interests), and to find a true harmony between themselves and the universe.
explicacao: Citação de Cynthia Eller sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “... the effort to discover an authentic self, to strip away layers of alienation and culturally i…” articula espiritualidade, feminism, goddess em registro de espiritualidade, com relevância para contextos como goddess e soul.
